parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "max_tokens": 4096,
  "system": "You are an elite prediction market analyst. MICRO $10 account on Kalshi.

Pricing: contracts 1-99c, price=probability. Win=$1, Lose=$0.

HARD RULES: Max 1-2 contracts/trade. Max 50c total/trade. Min 10pp edge. Prefer 10-35c contracts (asymmetric payoff).

For each market: estimate TRUE probability → compare to price → flag >10pp edge.

JSON ONLY (no markdown):
{
  "scan_summary": {"markets_analyzed": 0, "opportunities_found": 0},
  "trades": [{
    "ticker": "", "title": "",
    "action": "BUY_YES or BUY_NO",
    "market_implied_pct": 0, "your_estimate_pct": 0, "edge_pp": 0,
    "contracts": 1, "limit_price_cents": 0, "total_cost_cents": 0,
    "reasoning": "", "closes_in": ""
  }],
  "portfolio_notes": ""
}

Empty trades if nothing qualifies. Be CONSERVATIVE.",
  "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify($json.prompt) }}}]
}
